column1: # Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are ignored.
#   fastq_r1    Path to R1 FASTQ (gzipped or plain)
#   fastq_r2    Path to R2 FASTQ  (leave empty for single-end)
#   group       Biological group label (e.g. WT, KO, treated, control)
#   comparison  Comparison identifier matching config.yaml comparisons list
#               Use "treatment_vs_control" format; leave blank if not in a comparison
